title: External Apps
description: Manage external applications integrated with your tenant.
noAppsDescription: Add your first external app to get started.

createDialog.title: Add External App
createDialog.urlMustStartWithHttp: URL must start with http:// or https://
createDialog.noParams: No parameters. Add one to attach query string values to the URL.
createDialog.invalidParamKey: Key may only contain letters, digits, '_' and '-'
createDialog.iframeHtmlDescription: Provide a raw <iframe ...></iframe> tag. Content will be sanitized server-side.

deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
